description: Baseline: PerResidueVAE, latent_dim=8, hidden_dim=64, lr=1e-3, beta=0.1, 50 epochs

asi.hypothesis: More model capacity (latent_dim=16, hidden_dim=128) improves reconstruction on held-out proteins

description: Lower lr=5e-4, beta=0.05, 80 epochs - better reconstruction

asi.hypothesis: Lower learning rate + lower KL weight + more epochs improves reconstruction quality on held-out proteins

description: KL annealing beta=0→0.1 over 30 epochs - worse than fixed beta=0.05

asi.hypothesis: KL annealing should help VAE use latent space
asi.result: Worse - KL even at beta=0.1 too strong
asi.next_action: Try even lower beta (0.01) or no annealing

description: Very low beta=0.01, 100 epochs - massive reconstruction improvement

asi.hypothesis: Very low KL weight (beta=0.01) allows model to focus on reconstruction

description: Very low beta=0.001, 120 epochs - approaching AE reconstruction quality

asi.hypothesis: Near-zero KL weight lets model focus entirely on reconstruction

description: Denoising VAE: noise_std=0.05, beta=0.001, 120 epochs - improves robustness

asi.hypothesis: Denoising VAE (input noise std=0.05) improves robustness and ensemble quality
